_meta.library: DB UX DS v3 - DB Theme Icons
_meta.purpose: Comfort layer: resolve a functional icon by its DB Theme name (e.g. "arrow_right") to its Figma componentKey, so a plan can write { "type": "Icon", "name": "arrow_right" } instead of a raw key. The raw-key path ({ "type": "Icon", "key": "..." }) still works and takes precedence.
_meta.nameNormalization: Plan names use underscores (arrow_right). The Figma icon component_set name uses hyphens (arrow-right). Lookup is case-insensitive and treats _, -, and spaces as equivalent.
_meta.howToExtend: Icons not listed here are resolved on demand: call search_design_system with the hyphenated icon name (e.g. "arrow-right") scoped to library "DB UX DS v3 - DB Theme Icons", take the returned componentKey (a component_set), and add it below AND to ICON_KEYS in db-figma-runtime.js, then rebuild via `node build-runtime.cjs`.
_meta.fallback: An unresolved name falls back to the generic icon placeholder (ICON_KEY) — never fails the render.
